title: Memory Foam
description: A mod which allows a server owner or anyone with world file access the ability to associate beds to specific potion effects, including modded effects and beds alike!
body:
Memory Foam
======
A simple mod that uses a TOML config file to map potion effects to beds slept in. Fully configurable and mod-agnostic for both beds and potion effects. The config is world-sided and therefore requires to first load the world with the mod to create the config file a first time.  
Ports to other modloaders and MC versions in the future, maybe.  


### Installation and info  
This mod is purely server-sided.  
This mod is licensed under the MIT license, do whatever you must with it as long as you give proper credit.
